description: phased Holoscan Sensor Bridge bring-up: clone, configure host, build + run demo container, verify connectivity (destructive)
rules: destructive: shells out to a remote devkit over SSH and applies privileged host/network changes
runs the mandatory token-budget preflight (Phase 0) before any remote command or devkit change
SSH_TARGET and REMOTE_ROOT are required; HSB_PLATFORM may be empty and is auto-detected from hardware
skip Phase 3 (native CLI build) for non-AGX-Thor platforms
each phase command runs through hsb_phase_runner.sh with timestamped logs under record_store
usage: Set SSH_TARGET (remote login), REMOTE_ROOT (remote repo dir), and optionally HSB_PLATFORM. Output: hsb_setup.json (audit) + per-phase logs.
limitation: Has side effects: never runs automatically and only on explicit invocation. Requires SSH access to a powered, networked, properly-OS'd devkit, docker, and (often) sudo on the host. A successful ping to 192.168.0.2 confirms the control-plane path only — not enumeration or data-plane correctness.
